




## Coding Problems

Datasets:
- Hitters (ISLR)
- Wine Quality (UCI)

1. Fit an OLS model predicting salary in the Hitters dataset.

2. Fit ridge regression and plot coefficient paths.

3. Fit lasso regression and identify selected variables.

4. Use cross-validation to select optimal $\lambda$.

5. Compare ridge vs lasso prediction error.

6. Standardize predictors and refit ridge regression.

7. Compare coefficients between OLS and ridge.

8. Repeat analysis using the Wine dataset.

9. Plot prediction error vs $\lambda$.

10. Interpret which variables are most important.

---
